name: pdf-parser
description: Construction Document Area & Volume Extraction Tool

scripts.stage:data: mkdir -p data/schema data/beam && cp -r ../schema/materials data/schema/ && cp ../schema/material.schema.json data/schema/ && cp ../schema/sample.json data/schema/ && cp "../docs/csv files from BEAM/Footings & Slabs.csv" data/beam/footings-slabs.csv && echo 'Staged schema + BEAM picker CSVs into PDF-Parser/data/'
